final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: 35mm film poster photography, 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic, Wong Kar-wai inspired romantic melancholy, visible film grain
Composition: medium shot of embracing couple on ancient city wall, wide-angle establishing shot, background figures in soft focus
Subject: Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in passionate embrace and kiss on the ancient city wall, traditional Chinese costumes
Scene/backdrop: sunset-drenched ancient Chinese city wall, distant silhouette of Bull Demon King and Tang Seng standing apart, nostalgic atmosphere
Lighting/mood: golden hour backlighting, warm romantic glow, hazy atmospheric depth, bittersweet and nostalgic mood
Color palette: warm amber and gold as dominant tones, muted earth tones, subtle cyan shadows, vintage color grading
Materials/textures: 35mm film grain texture, slightly soft focus, organic film imperfections, matte paper poster feel
Text (verbatim): "大话西游"
Avoid: digital sharpness, modern CGI look, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, contemporary clean aesthetics
